title: AI-assisted DSA Practice: Real-time Help in CodeGrind
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI assistant guiding real-time problem solving in our DSA practice platform, with problem editor, code execution, and Azure OpenAI integration.
core_message: CodeGrind now blends LeetCode-style challenges with an AI assistant to help users solve problems faster while learning. Real-time guidance, multi-model support, and an interactive editor empower practice sessions without sacrificing hands-on coding.
cta: Try a live problem with AI help now
visual_brief: A short 15–20s demo video showing the CodeGrind editor in action: a user selects a LeetCode-like problem, types in code, AI assistant provides inline suggestions, and the Azure OpenAI model switches to a higher-accuracy mode mid-session. End with a call-to-action overlay and the CodeGrind logo.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
